sourceMovie.title: What's Eating Gilbert Grape
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: What's Eating Gilbert Grape works as a romance movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The romance and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Me Before You
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If What's Eating Gilbert Grape clicked for you, Me Before You (2016) is a strong next stop: both trade in romance and drama, with emotional whiplash that feels honest. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after What's Eating Gilbert Grape?
faq.answer: Try Me Before You, The Time Traveler's Wife, The Bridges of Madison County—each shares DNA with What's Eating Gilbert Grape while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is What's Eating Gilbert Grape?
faq.answer: What's Eating Gilbert Grape (1993) is best described as Romance, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is What's Eating Gilbert Grape worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.7/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this romance lane.
